response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned software craftsman with 15+ years of broad full-stack and systems experience, and his recent MCP/agentic workflow work at re:cinq is directly relevant to the role's technology list. However, the position demands a minimum of 8 years building production-grade AI solutions, and his GenAI experience dates only to April 2025 — roughly one month. Python, the lingua franca of the GenAI ecosystem, is absent from his skills entirely. There is no demonstrable expertise in RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. The foundational engineering quality is high, but the AI depth required for a staff-level forward-deployed role is not yet there.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow development at re:cinq, directly matching a key technology listed in the JD
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise combined with AWS CDK usage, covering the cloud-platform and primary-language requirements partially
Proven staff-level seniority across multiple companies with a strong software-craftsmanship baseline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the listed skills, which is the dominant language for GenAI tooling, LLM frameworks, and data pipelines
AI/GenAI experience is approximately one month old (re:cinq, April 2025), dramatically short of the 8-year production AI requirement
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, or named multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume
